Organisation of the discharge ceremony for four (4) recovered patients at CME/HZ Rwampara, chaired by the Director General of INSP. | Supervised accompaniment of the Director General of INSP across technical pillars (laboratory, planning, data management and SitRep drafting). | Coordination team visit to health zones to assess the zonal response approach. | Technical support from WHO to all response pillars. | Receipt of 162 blood bags for transfusion care as part of continuity of essential health services. | Receipt of 30 motorcycles as logistical support from the central Government for surveillance and coordination.

Official inauguration of the standardised Ebola Treatment Centre (ETC) at CME Rwampara, rehabilitated and handed over by the WHO Director General to the EVD Incident Manager representing the Minister of Public Health.
